calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Claire Sullivan appeared by zoom for petitioners.

Mrs. Sullivan stated that she reviewed the examiner's notes, that she understands that there is no evidence showing the settlor's intent to designate the trust as the IRA beneficiary, referred to the pour-over will, stated that the husband was the owner of the IRA, that when he passed away it automatically went to the wife, that at the time the wife was in poor health and that she passed away four months later and was unable to designate a beneficiary. Mrs. Sullivan also stated that the intent is clear that the settlor did not want her heirs to have to do probate and have everything transferred to trust, that she did not receive any objections from the beneficiaries, that they have not consented, but all were noticed, and that if the IRA is given outright to the beneficiaries, it would impact the beneficiary with special needs. In addition, Mrs. Sullivan referred to Probate Code 13501(b), and stated that the will is a pour-over will and everything would go into the trust, and that this will not create a new trust. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
